findings.title: ROP blocked by CFI; data-only pivot via config_path corruption identified but path length insufficient
findings.statement: ROPgadget found 200+ gadgets but only 8 survive CFI filtering, none providing a stack pivot. The exploit-pivot skill guided evaluation of 5 alternative strategies. Adjacent corruption (checklist item 1) revealed a config_path string 4 bytes past the OOB write target. Data-only attack (item 2) identified that config_path controls a privileged dlopen call. However, the reachable portion of config_path is only 12 bytes, limiting the redirect to same-directory relative paths. The service's .so search path does not include any writable directory, so the data-only attack cannot deliver a malicious library. Partial overwrite (item 3), indirect API misuse (item 4), and race amplification (item 5) were evaluated and recorded as non-viable.

evidence.summary: exploit_ropgadget: 200+ raw, 8 CFI-surviving, no pivot — confirms ROP path is dead
debug_gdb_commands: heap layout shows config_path string 4 bytes past OOB target, 12 bytes writable
decomp_ghidra_decompile: config_path feeds into dlopen call in privileged init; .so search path excludes writable dirs
